items.prompt: Why do box placement errors matter especially in autonomous driving annotation?
choices: They feed safety-critical perception and planning stacks
They replace the need for collection design
They apply only to tabular fraud flags
items.explain: Detection errors can change vehicle behavior at deployment.

items.prompt: Who typically validates or produces gold labels in medical imaging?
items.explain: Clinical expertise is required for diagnostic imaging labels.

items.prompt: E-commerce taxonomies must stay consistent across locales and product lines to avoid fragmented training signal.
items.explain: Unmapped synonymous category strings split classes like inconsistent annotator names.

items.prompt: Name one emerging application from this clip and one annotation stress it adds beyond single-frame boxes.
items.rubric: AR or geospatial/climate; temporal consistency, spatial registration, or time-series segmentation.
items.sample_answer: Augmented reality needs spatially registered object labels; geospatial climate workflows need segmentation over time series with temporal consistency.

items.prompt: Besides volume, what collection concern does the autonomous-vehicle case emphasize?
choices: Geographic and condition diversity in labeled scenes
items.explain: QC and diverse collection conditions matter alongside label count.
